name: Dragon Scale Mail
overview: Armor made from dragon scales that grants bonuses and dragon-related benefits.

properties.material: Dragon Scale Mail is made of the scales of one kind of dragon. Sometimes dragons collect their cast-off scales and gift them. Other times, hunters carefully preserve the hide of a dead dragon
properties.ac_bonus: You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class
properties.breath_defense: You have Advantage on saving throws against the breath weapons of Dragons
properties.resistance: You have Resistance to one damage type determined by the kind of dragon that provided the scales

dragon_sense.ability: You can focus your senses as a Magic action to discern the distance and direction to the closest dragon within 30 miles of yourself that is of the same type as the armor
dragon_sense.recharge: This action can't be used again until the next dawn
